title: A Bayesian Approach to Segmentation with Noisy Labels via Spatially Correlated Distributions

method.key_innovation: Reformulating the MLE framework using a probabilistic model that accounts for spatially correlated distributions of noisy labels
method.performance: Achieves performance comparable to training with clean labels under moderate noise levels for tasks like lung segmentation

citations: Several citations are included, though full references are not provided in the text
